default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress, challenges, and next steps for Udemy's content strategy and newsletter development with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift focus from L\&D leaders to line-of-business owners (CIO, CTO, heads of development) for content targeting](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Explore leveraging Udemy's "system of learning" concept and skills tree for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Consider starting with newsletter development over immediate SEO improvements to resources page](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Align on building content around the "skill graph" idea, likely on a subdomain](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [Shifting focus from L\&D leaders to line-of-business executives (CIO, CTO, heads of development)](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [L\&D often acts as "order takers" rather than strategic leaders in many organizations](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Goal: Target decision-makers who are thinking about team optimization and transformation](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)

### Udemy's "System of Learning" Concept

  - [Mapping skills to content using Udemy's skills tree](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Customers want to know foundational skills and "jobs to be done" for specific roles](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Opportunity to create content around building end-to-end learning experiences](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Highlight multimodal approach and human-in-the-loop advantage over pure LLM solutions](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Instructor Content Utilization

  - [List of \~300 VIP instructors available](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Many instructors open to content repurposing for marketing](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [New team member starting to formalize instructor partnerships for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)

### Newsletter vs. SEO Strategy

  - [Current resources page (business.udemy/resources) shows low SEO value](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Two potential approaches discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
    1.  Improve SEO first, then add newsletter
    2.  Start with MVP newsletter, potentially driving SEO improvements as a byproduct
  - [Leaning towards starting with newsletter for perception shift and transformative impact](https://fathom.video/share/jWJnoKyvrpKjZe4zcpxN-9cN6WQzEdXn?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)

### Content Development and Hosting
